title: ModalModules User Preferences
description: End-user preferences for how to handle each modal category. Separate from rules.default.json (which describes *detection*) — this file describes *intent*: what should happen when something is detected.

popups.description: Newsletter signups, exit-intent popups, paywalls, and generic modal overlays. 'remove' = strip from DOM/HTML; 'ignore' = leave alone.

cookies.description: Cookie consent banners. 'accept' = click the site's Accept button (browser only — site records consent properly); 'decline' = click the Reject button (browser only); 'remove' = strip from DOM (consent NOT recorded — banner reappears next visit); 'ignore' = leave alone.

authModals.description: Login / sign-up / create-account / registration modals. 'remove' = strip from DOM/HTML; 'ignore' = leave alone (useful if your scraper actually needs to log in).
